Home Our Products

Premium Wood Lockers. Unbeatable Prices.

p r o d u c t

our products

Quick Ship & Custom

Quick ship ships in 2 to 4 weeks: Stadium & Elite in 24" or 30" widths, Light Gray or Dark Gray. Custom orders are 8–12 weeks: any size, any wood, or materials. Price match guarantee on USA competitors.

Semi Pro

Semi Pro $349

View spec sheet →
Varsity

Varsity $449

View spec sheet →
Pro

Pro $549

View spec sheet →
Stadium · Quick Ship (2–4 weeks)

Stadium $599

View spec sheet →
Specifications
  • Standard size shown: 24" W x 76" H x 19" D
  • Base: optional 4" high base can be added
  • Weight: approx. 175 lbs
  • Quick Ship (2–4 weeks): 24" or 30" widths, Light Gray or Dark Gray
  • Base price: $599 · Colors: Black, Light Grey, Dark Grey, Maple
  • Custom: 8–12 weeks — any size, any wood, or materials
View product Request a quote
Specifications
  • Standard size shown: 24" W x 76" H x 19" D
  • Base: optional 4" high base can be added
  • Weight: approx. 175 lbs
  • Premium tier with maximum customization · Base price: $599
  • Colors: Black, Light Grey, Dark Grey, Maple
  • Custom: 8–12 weeks — any size, wood, or materials
View product Request a quote
Specifications
  • Standard size shown: 24" W x 76" H x 19" D
  • Base: optional 4" high base can be added
  • Weight: approx. 175 lbs
  • Colors: Black, Light Grey, Dark Grey, Maple · Custom colors available
View product Request a quote
Accessories

Lock Box & Stick Rack

View accessories →

finishing touches

locker accessories

Dial in every detail – airflow, storage, comfort, and branding.

Cushions

+ $75.00 (top or bottom) / $150.00 (both)

High-density foam cushions upholstered for comfort and durability – available on the top, bottom, or both.

Coat Rod

Call for pricing

Heavy-duty coat rod for jerseys, jackets, and gear – sized to match each locker style.

Hooks

Call for pricing

Additional interior hooks for bags, helmets, and everyday gear, matched to your locker layout.

Name Plate

+ $10.00

Clean, simple name plate for player identification – ideal for teams that want a classic, organized look.

Skate Hooks

+ $25.00

Additional wall-mounted hooks positioned for skates or gear, perfect for hockey or figure skating locker rooms.

Custom Logo

+ $75.00

Team or program branding applied to the locker face – reinforce your identity every time players walk in.

Lock Box & Stick Rack

Lock box with digital key lock (+$80) and stick rack (from $299). View details and request a quote.

View accessories →

Compare All Tiers

Feature Semi Pro Varsity Pro Curve Stadium
Price (Sale) $349 $449 $549 $649 $599
3/4" Solid Wood Yes Yes Yes Yes Yes
5 Year Warranty Yes Yes Yes Yes Yes
Modular Design Yes Yes Yes Yes Yes
Custom Branding Basic Premium Maximum Premium Ultimate
Storage Capacity Standard Enhanced Maximum Enhanced Elite
Finishing Quality Professional Premium Elite Premium Championship
Design Style Standard Standard Standard Curved Standard

Not Sure Which Tier is Right for You?

Get a free custom design consultation. Our team will help you choose the perfect locker solution for your program and budget.

Get Free Consultation

PlayerStall

Luxury custom-built wood lockers with full color options. Quick ship in one month (24" & 30" widths) or custom-built in three months. 30+ years of craftsmanship.

2934 200 Street, Langley, BC V2Z 2C1 Canada

sales@playerstall.com

1 888 584 1444

QUICK CONTACT INFO

Premium wood lockers at unbeatable prices. Quick ship in 2–4 weeks or custom in 8–12 weeks. We'll match any USA competitor's price. Call for a free quote.
